# Repaglinide 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Repaglinide 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Repaglinide</strong> 目前有 <strong>5 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Repaglinide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Repaglinide is indicated in patients with type-2 diabetes (non-insulin-dependent diabetes mellitus (NIDDM)) whose hyperglycaemia can no longer be controlled satisfactorily by diet, weight reduction...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>opsismodysplasia（98.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（98.6%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（97.8%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（97.7%）</li>
<li>pressure-induced localized lipoatrophy（97.6%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（97.6%）</li>
<li>idiopathic localized lipodystrophy（97.4%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（93.6%）</li>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（92.7%）</li>
<li>cholangiocarcinoma, susceptibility to（64.0%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（61.0%）</li>
<li>hemoglobin C-beta-thalassemia syndrome（60.2%）</li>
<li>woolly hair, autosomal recessive 3（59.3%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（59.1%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（58.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete breast fibroadenosis（58.6%）</li>
<li>atrial flutter (disease)（58.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/repaglinide/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
